Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' occurrences that are followed by 'Accepted + In Progress'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Assigned' in variants with performance duration below the median variant performance
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' activities that occur before 'Completed + In Call' in the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Number of distinct cases where 'Accepted + Assigned' is executed more than once
Percentage of variants starting with 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' that include 'Accepted + Assigned' before reaching 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Assigned' compared to the frequency of 'Accepted + Wait - User' in the entire log
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' executions that belong to cases ending in 'Completed + Resolved' followed by 'Completed + Closed'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Number of 'Accepted + Assigned' events occurring in cases with 'High' impact
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + Assigned' activities == 'High' where ma is the last value of impact

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' that directly precedes a waiting state (e.g., 'Accepted + Wait - User', 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor', 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation', or 'Accepted + Wait')
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Assigned' in variants that contain at least one re-queuing (i.e., multiple occurrences of 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment')
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Assigned' out of all 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Percentage of all 'Accepted + In Progress' activities that are immediately preceded by 'Accepted + Assigned'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all 'Accepted + Assigned'
